acceptTerms().details: *** CHANGED *** Fractional settlement removed — already handled by _settleAndReset() at proposeTerms time. lastAccruedAt is already clean. New terms applied and lastAccruedAt reset to now for clean accrual start.

constructor.details: Locks the implementation contract so only proxies can initialize state.

proposeTerms(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.details: *** CHANGED *** Previously used _accrue() then set active = false, leaving lastAccruedAt at the old boundary — same dangerous gap as setWorkerStatus. Now uses _settleAndReset() so fractional remainder is paid out and lastAccruedAt is clean before the proposal period begins.

setWorkerStatus(address,bool).details: *** CHANGED *** Previously _accrue() only was called, leaving lastAccruedAt at the old pause timestamp. This caused the entire paused duration to be counted as worked time on the next _accrue() call after resume. Now on pause: _settleAndReset() settles whole intervals + fractional remainder and resets lastAccruedAt to now — no earned time is lost and no paused time accumulates. On resume: lastAccruedAt is already at pause timestamp (recent) so accrual starts cleanly from that point forward. No reset needed.

updateWorkerInterval(address,uint8,uint2.details: *** CHANGED *** Added reset of lastAccruedAt when worker is inactive to prevent the paused gap from carrying over as worked time on resume.

claim().notice: Claims caller worker's available earnings to caller.

claimTo(address).notice: Claims caller worker's earnings to a custom recipient.

claimable(address).notice: Returns current claimable amount for a worker.

initialize(address).notice: Initializes payroll ownership for a freshly deployed instance.

proposeTerms(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.notice: Operator proposes new payroll terms for a worker.

treasuryRunway().notice: *** CHANGED *** Previously used raw address(this).balance for runway calculation, overstating available funds by including ETH already owed to workers as accruedWei. Now subtracts total accrued across all workers first so runway reflects only ETH that is actually free to fund future accrual.

updateWorkerInterval(address,uint8,uint2.notice: Updates the worker's timeline type and interval duration.
